opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The fundamental problem here isn't prediction accuracy—it's the feedback loop between your AI's outputs and market reaction. When your system generates a "prediction" that moves the market, you've created a non-stationary environment where your training data actively contradicts future patterns. You need either adversarial training against simulated market makers or strict separation between your inference pipeline and your own tool access to avoid self-deception through internal tool calls.
actions.reasoning: As someone who built multi-provider LLM routing systems and agent orchestration frameworks, I have direct experience with the technical challenges that would arise in an AI-driven decision system.
